name: Pearls 'n' Chocolate Cookies
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Package white chocolate baking pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until creamy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture.
6. Stir in chocolate pieces.
7. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 9-10 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
9. Let stand for 2 minutes before removing from cookie sheets; cool completely.
